title: beta vulgaris convar. cicla
intro: Beta vulgaris convar. cicla, also known as garden beet or sugar beet, is a variant of the Beta vulgaris plant, a cool-season crop that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Beta vulgaris convar. cicla include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide essential nutrients such as iron, potassium, and fiber. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through juice, tea, or capsule form, with the juice being a popular supplement due to its high concentration of betalains, which have been shown to have anti-cancer properties.
